examples: Everyone says this, but it really is a top tip for frugal eaters.
The honourable worker who lives a very frugal life gives away most of his money to charities.
They learned how to trim almost 20 percent off their monthly child care bills during the 30-day "Frugal Family Challenge".
He hoarded cash in good times, spent it in bad times and stayed frugal.
My father was always very frugal (a trait I inherited, for better or for worse).
